_note: IoTeX Testnet — Phase 74 deployment complete 2026-03-19 (31 contracts LIVE)
_status: COMPLETE — 31 contracts LIVE (Phase 69+70 deployed 2026-03-19: DataSovereigntyRegistry, HumanityOracle, RulingOracle, PassportOracle, VAPIRewardDistributor, VAPIDataMarketplace, VAPIGovernanceTimelock, VAPIProtocolLens)
_iotx_spent: ~7.2 IOTX original + ~1.7 IOTX Phase 62 + ~0.3 IOTX Phase 66/68 + ~6.2 IOTX Phase 69/70 = ~15.4 IOTX total

_wiring_notes.BountyMarket_gate: TournamentGateV2 wired (setTournamentGate called in deploy-phase25.js). TournamentGateV3 is bridge-queryable but NOT wired to BountyMarket (gate already set). Wire V3 manually if needed.
_wiring_notes.PITLSessionRegistry: LIVE — PitlSessionProofVerifier wired via setPITLVerifier() on 2026-03-08. Real Groth16 proofs required.
_wiring_notes.PitlSessionProofVerifier: Groth16 verifier for PitlSessionProof v1 circuit (Poseidon 7 inputs).
_wiring_notes.VAPIioIDRegistry: Phase 55 — DID device identity registry. Bridge: 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692. Deployed 2026-03-16.
_wiring_notes.PITLTournamentPassport: Phase 56 — ZK tournament passport (mock mode until setPassportVerifier called). Wired to PITLSessionRegistry + VAPIioIDRegistry. Deployed 2026-03-16.
_wiring_notes.TournamentPassportVerifier: Phase 56 — Groth16 verifier for TournamentPassport.circom. Wired via setPassportVerifier() 2026-03-16. PITLTournamentPassport now LIVE.
_wiring_notes.PITLSessionRegistryV2: Phase 62 — PITL session registry with Phase 62 circuit (C3 inference code binding). Bridge: 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692. Deployed 2026-03-16.
_wiring_notes.PitlSessionProofVerifierV2: Phase 62 — Groth16 verifier for PitlSessionProof circuit with C3 constraint (Poseidon 8 inputs). Wired via setPITLVerifier() 2026-03-16. PITLSessionRegistryV2 now LIVE.
_wiring_notes.RulingRegistry: Phase 66/68 — On-chain ruling enforcement anti-replay registry. Deployed 2026-03-18. operator=0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692.
_wiring_notes.CeremonyRegistry: Phase 67/68 — MPC ceremony audit trail. 3 circuits registered. Beacon: IoTeX block #41723255 (0xb92d0544685c708d9ced3c52f74c61087e1851d5bcf55af3ec0b54413284e987). verifyCeremony() OK for all circuits. Deployed 2026-03-18.
_wiring_notes.DataSovereigntyRegistry: Phase 69 — Immutable data sovereignty pledge. Three-tier licensing (MANUFACTURER/DEVELOPER/GAMER). Call pledge_() once after deploy. operator=0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692.
_wiring_notes.HumanityOracle: Phase 69 — Native VAPI oracle. DataCuratorAgent writes after each PITL cycle. humanityPct scaled ×10 (1000 = 100.0%). Any tournament contract may query.
_wiring_notes.RulingOracle: Phase 69 — Native VAPI oracle. Wraps RulingEnforcementAgent streak state. isEligible() = not suspended AND flagStreak < 5 AND holdStreak < 2.
_wiring_notes.PassportOracle: Phase 69 — Native VAPI oracle. Wraps PITLTournamentPassport on-chain status. hasVerifiedPassport() = issued AND onChain.
_wiring_notes.VAPIRewardDistributor: Phase 69 — DePIN token distributor. Device-gated (not player-gated, separation ratio 0.362). Multipliers stack: passport 1.5× + enrollment 2.0× + streak 2.5× + MPC 1.25× + gate 3.0×. setRewardToken() before first claim.
_wiring_notes.VAPIDataMarketplace: Phase 69 — Three-tier data exchange. MANUFACTURER/DEVELOPER/GAMER only. Data pricing in VAPI reward points. 70% device pool / 30% treasury revenue split. sovereigntyRegistry wired.
_wiring_notes.VAPIGovernanceTimelock: Phase 70 — 48h governance timelock for Phase 69 contracts. coSigner=deployer (update via setCoSigner). operator=0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692.
_wiring_notes.VAPIProtocolLens: Phase 70 — Zero-state unified device state view. Synthesizes 4 Phase 69 oracles in one eth_call. isFullyEligible(deviceId) -> bool.

_phase99a_note: Phase 99A: AGaaS Foundation Token Stack — testnet ONLY, no TGE
_phase99b_note: Phase 99B: VAPIGSRRegistry — GSR_ENABLED=false default, advisory layer
_phase99c_note: Phase 99C: VHP ERC-4671 soulbound + LayerZero V2 OApp — first cross-chain physiological humanity credential
_phase111_note: Phase 111: AdjudicationRegistry — PoAd hash anchor; on-chain anchoring from bridge deferred to Phase 112
_phase112_note: Phase 112: PoAdAnchorAgent activated — bridge polls poad_registry_log and calls chain.record_adjudication(); poad_on_chain_enabled=False default
_phase112_status: CODE COMPLETE (POAD_ON_CHAIN_ENABLED=true + real AdjudicationRegistry address required to activate)
_phase113_note: Phase 113: VAPIDualPrimitiveGate — dual-primitive composability gate (PoAC + PoAd)
_phase221_note: Phase 221: PoPC — Merkle root anchor over 36-agent fleet; isCoherent(maxAgeSec) wired into VAPIProtocolLens
_phase222_note: Phase 222: BBG — governance proposals gated on live VHP; blocks STOLEN_KEY+VHP_EXPIRY+FLASH_LOAN attacks
_phase237_note: Phase 237: VAPIConsentRegistry — per-category gamer consent (TOURNAMENT_GATE / ANONYMIZED_RESEARCH / MANUFACTURER_CERT / MARKETPLACE), gamer-self-sovereign (msg.sender writes), bridge reads only
_phase_o0_agent_registry_note: Phase O0 Stream 2: AgentRegistry — agent identity (agentId → publicKey, scopeHash, status); Ownable + ReentrancyGuard pattern matching VAPIBiometricGovernance Phase 222; owner is bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692; no agents registered at deploy (first registration in Phase O0 Section 6.4 after GitHub Apps registration completes).
_phase_o0_agent_scope_note: Phase O0 Stream 2: AgentScope — operational scope storage (agentId → scopeRoot); Ownable + ReentrancyGuard pattern matching AgentRegistry; owner is bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692; agentRegistry reference immutable at 0x9548E9d17c2d40350629b1b88ff1D2c01B0414a4; two-layer scope enforcement: AgentRegistry.scopeHash = governance commitment, AgentScope.scopeRoot = operational state, deliberately allowed to differ.
_phase_o0_audit_log_note: Phase O0 Stream 2: AuditLog — system-level Tessera signed-tree-head anchor; Ownable + ReentrancyGuard pattern; owner is bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692; no contract dependencies (Y-A design, distinct from per-agent contracts); ships empty in P0; first checkpoint occurs in P1+ when Tessera upstream feed is wired.
_phase_o0_agent_slashing_note: Phase O0 Stream 2: AgentSlashing — VetoSlasher-pattern economic accountability (bond → propose → 24h veto → burn); Z-A pure burn (slashed amounts to 0xdead); W-A partial slashing (per-proposal slashAmount); Ownable + ReentrancyGuard pattern; owner is bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692; agentRegistry reference immutable at 0x9548E9d17c2d40350629b1b88ff1D2c01B0414a4; vetoWindowSeconds immutable at 86400 (24h).
_phase_o0_agent_adjudication_registry_no: Phase O0 Stream 2: AgentAdjudicationRegistry — agent-scoped action anchor; hosts AGENT_COMMIT v1 (Pass 2A V10) and PHYSICAL_DATA_ATTESTATION v1 (Pass 2B Path 3) via U-Enum FROZEN four-entry actionType vocabulary; V-A reserved-as-documentation; UNION storage (anchorId-keyed array + per-agent index + actionHash anti-replay); Ownable + ReentrancyGuard pattern; owner is bridge wallet 0x0Cf36dB57fc4680bcdfC65D1Aff96993C57a4692; agentRegistry immutable at 0x9548E9d17c2d40350629b1b88ff1D2c01B0414a4; agentScope immutable at 0xc694692a69bbf1cDAda87d5bc43D345C4579FF13; requireAgentScope modifier reads operational truth (Decision C, Session 2).
_phase_o0_section_6_4_block_b_note: Phase O0 Section 6.4 Block B: VAPIOperatorAgentNFT — custom DeviceNFT contract per Pass 2C Section 14.4 N2 β canonical resolution. Verbatim copy of canonical contracts/examples/DeviceNFT.sol from github.com/iotexproject/ioID-contracts at commit b94ad092. Used as the deviceContract parameter in ioIDRegistry.register; per-agent device tokenIds (anchor-sentry → 1, guardian → 2 by mint order) are consumed during agent registration. Address is placeholder zero until contracts/scripts/deploy-vapi-operator-agent-nft.js executes on iotex_testnet (gas estimate ~0.30 IOTX deploy + 0.05 IOTX initialize+configureMinter; total Section 14.6 budget ~1.73 IOTX with 9.8x headroom against 16.97 IOTX bridge wallet). Per V8.3: post-deployment commit updates VAPI_OPERATOR_AGENT_NFT_ADDR constant in bridge/vapi_bridge/agent_registration.py from placeholder to deployed address; commit message documents deployment transaction hash.
